NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JAN-24-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01
JUDGE WICK, BETH WILBER - CLERK, MARILYN NORMAN - REPORTER: O/C, SETTLED IN DEPT. #1, STIPULATED JUDGMENT SUBMITTED TO THE COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MUNSON, OSCAR AKA CESAR MUNSON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 146 MCALLISTER ST, #76 $1,297.98 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,297.98, STAYED UNTIL FEB-06-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT MAY ISSUE, BUT NO EVICTION UNTIL AFTER 4PM, 2/6/95; EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN COSTS & ATTY. FEES; DEPOSIT TO BE RETAINED BY PLTF; (SEE FILE FOR MORE DETAIL).
